g.text: Scene 1/5 — Inject rules at every prompt header
(UserPromptSubmit hook → ~490 token anchor)
$ echo {prompt} | karma_user_prompt_submit.py | jq additionalContext
[karma — long-term agreement anchor (compact form; full preferences injected at
session start)]
This turn: a quick name + one-line reminder of each direction. Full preference t
ext was injected at session start.
1. [long-term-fundamental] 用户相信你能深挖根因。遇到难题他希望你先停下想「最干净
的解法是什么」 〔Last response had drift on this one — let's realign this turn〕
2. [non-blocking-parallel] sleep / wait / 等长任务跑完期间，用户等你的输出。盯着
进度条不是协作 — 是「卡了」。 〔Last response had drift on this one — let's rea
lign this turn〕
3. [chinese-plain-no-jargon] 跟你协作的用户是非技术身份，他要的是听得懂的汇报。把
「F1 / precision /
4. [loud-failure-with-evidence] 用户信任你，但「应该 /
Scene 2/5 — Real-time block of sleep 30
(PreToolUse hook → non-blocking-parallel)
$ echo {tool=Bash, command=sleep 30} | karma_pre_tool_use.py
{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "de
ny", "permissionDecisionReason": "karma 拦截：违反 'non-blocking-parallel'。\n检
测到：Bash sleep command: 'sleep 30'\n方向：sleep / wait / 等长任务跑完期间，用户
等你的输出。盯着进度条不是协作 — 是「卡了」。\n起完 background 任务立刻推进下一件
能做的（读相关文件 / 起另一个子 Agent /\n设计下一步）— 任务完成你会被通知到。多个
独立任务优先并发起，不要串行排队。\n建议：sleep periods make the user wait; expe
rience is 'stuck.' Switch to run_in_background=True kicking off the task, then i
mmediately push the next doable thing (read related files / spawn another sub-ag
ent / design next step) — task completion will notify you. For wait-on-condition
, use Monitor + until loop."}}
Scene 3/5 — Catch short-term intent in Agent response
(Stop hook → long-term v0.11.0 response-level)
$ # Agent said: "Let me just hardcode this case to ship it"
$ echo {transcript_path} | karma_stop.py
⚠ karma: Agent 违反 'keep-pushing-no-stop' — Response is pure-statement conclusi
on with no push signal / no decision question — real stop without a next step
建议：The user is fully-delegating — after finishing a wave, they expect you
to immediately find the next push point and continue, not silently stop and wait
for feedback. If you need their judgment, ask clearly; if truly saturated (reas
onable stop), say where you're stuck so they know.
{"decision": "block", "reason": "[karma — Last response didn't show a next-step
push signal] The user is fully-delegating — they expect immediate continuation a
fter finishing a wave. If you need their judgment, ask clearly; if truly saturat
ed, say where you're stuck — don't silently wait. (Reminder 1/2)"}
Scene 4/5 — Nudge Agent to keep pushing after silent stop
(Stop hook → keep-pushing-no-stop)
$ # Agent said: "Task complete." (pure statement, no next step)
ed, say where you're stuck — don't silently wait. (Reminder 2/2)"}
Scene 5/5 — Mid-conversation full reinject at decay threshold
(PostToolUse hook → byte_seq hits Opus 60K → full baseline)
$ # session state: tool_byte_seq=62000 (past Opus 60K threshold)
$ echo {tool=Read} | karma_post_tool_use.py | jq additionalContext (head)
[karma — Your long-term agreement with the user]
You're collaborating with a real human user who listed several long-term priorit
ies.
This isn't rules and isn't a judgment — these are the collaborative agreements t
hey hope to build with you.
1. 用户相信你能深挖根因。遇到难题他希望你先停下想「最干净的解法是什么」
而不是「最快糊过去」。短期补丁 / 硬编码 / 跳验证 flag 都是「以后会还的债」—
他愿意为长期质量等你多想几分钟。如果方案分歧大就提出来跟他对齐，
不要自己挑短期路再说。
2. sleep / wait / 等长任务跑完期间，用户等你的输出。盯着进度条不是协作 — 是「卡了
起完 background 任务立刻推进下一件能做的（读相关文件 / 起另一个子 Agent /
设计下一步）— 任务完...
That's karma in 60s — pure engineering, zero LLM.
github.com/jhaizhou-ops/karma
